backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the dairy farm backend with access control, user profiles, cattle management, customer management, delivery records, milk production/milk records, and associated CRUD operations and reporting types.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking two bug-fix features (Add Cattle and Add Customer form fixes) to their relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key changes such as corrected hook names and fixed backend field references.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors for backgrounds, cards, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, setting the page title to 'Dairy Business App' and mounting the app at the `#root` div via `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Query and TanStack Router with seven routes (dashboard, cattle, milk, inventory, customers, deliveries, reports) all wrapped in the Layout component.
frontend/src/components/CattleForm.tsx: Reusable form component for adding or editing cattle records with fields for breed, age, daily milk production, health status (healthy/sick/recovered), purchase date, cost, notes, and active status.
frontend/src/components/CustomerForm.tsx: Reusable controlled form component for adding or editing customer records with name, address, phone, and an active status toggle shown only in edit mode.
frontend/src/components/InventoryForm.ts: A React form component supporting two modes: 'add' (full inventory item creation with name, category, quantity, unit, and threshold) and 'update' (quantity-only update for an existing item).
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header with logo, desktop and mobile navigation links for all main routes, a main content area, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/MilkProductionCh: Renders a Recharts bar chart showing total milk production (in liters) for each of the last 7 days, derived from an array of MilkRecord objects.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppMessageM: A dialog modal that previews a formatted WhatsApp delivery confirmation message for a customer, with options to open WhatsApp directly or copy the message to the clipboard.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: Custom hook that wraps the Clipboard API to copy text, exposing isCopied state that auto-resets after a configurable delay and an error state for failures.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for all backend data operations including cattle, customers, milk records, delivery records, and user profiles, along with time utility functions for nanosecond/Date conversions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm earthy farm-themed design system in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/localTypes.ts: Defines a local TypeScript interface for InventoryItem used in frontend-only inventory tracking.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CattleManagement.tsx: Page component for viewing, adding, and editing cattle records, displaying a stats summary and a table with health badges and toggle controls.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerManagement.ts: Page component for managing customers with a stats overview, a data table, and dialogs for adding and editing customer records.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a hero banner, stat cards for active cattle, today's milk production, and missed deliveries, plus a recent milk records table and production chart.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryReports.tsx: Page component for logging and viewing daily milk delivery records, with a form to add deliveries, date-based filtering, summary stats, and a WhatsApp message modal for notifying customers.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryManagement.t: Page component for managing farm inventory (feed, medicine, supplies) with local state, low-stock alerts, and dialogs for adding items or updating quantities.
frontend/src/pages/MilkProduction.tsx: Page component for logging and filtering daily milk yield records per cattle, displaying a production chart and a sortable table of records with total liters summary.
frontend/src/pages/MonthlyReports.tsx: Page component that aggregates delivery and milk production data for a selected month/year, showing per-customer breakdowns, delivery-boy performance stats, and CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility that generates and triggers a browser download of a CSV file containing a customer's monthly delivery records along with a summary section.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them in sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappMessageFormat: Utility that formats a WhatsApp delivery-confirmation message string and generates a wa.me deep-link URL for a given customer phone number and delivery details.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with custom colors (using oklch variables), fonts, border radii, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, known issues, and two existing fix features: resolving broken 'Add Buffalo/Cattle' and 'Add Customer' form submission functionality in the backend.
